title: Vanilla Voip
description: The vanilla game experience with voice chat and performance mods
body:
Vanilla Voip is a modpack made for our private community. The goal is to stay as close to the default Minecraft experience as possible, while providing performance and an immersive social experience.

This modpack features:
- Text and voice chat in a close proximity to each player for a more immersive social experience.
- Performance optimization to improve the playability on older computers.
- Optional visual improvements such as further view distance and shaders.
- Quality of life additions:
    - Right click to harvest crops
    - Borderless Window
    - Better F3 menu
